untranslatable_reason: The signal references 'pred' (a predictive model output) which is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. This appears to be a machine learning model prediction score, not a standard technical indicator. To implement this rule, you would need to either: (1) add the 'pred' indicator to your allowed indicators list, or (2) substitute with a comparable technical indicator like MACD (used as a proxy here) that provides binary directional signals.
translation_notes: Signal uses external predictive model 'pred' with thresholds at 0.15 (entry) and -0.05 (exit). Substituted MACD as a technical proxy since it provides similar binary directional signals. Original logic: enter when pred > 0.15, exit when pred < -0.05, with max 20-day hold. The crosses_above operator captures the threshold crossing requirement from entry conditions.
